untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental ratio 'Earnings-to-Price (E/P) decile ranking' and decile portfolio formation logic. This is a cross-sectional factor-based strategy requiring fundamental data and portfolio construction, not a technical indicator-based rule. The ALLOWED INDICATORS list contains only technical price/volume indicators (MA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, etc.) and does not include fundamental data, decile rankings, or portfolio rebalancing mechanics. The backtest engine would need custom fundamental data handlers and portfolio formation logic to implement this signal.
translation_notes: This is a classic factor-based anomaly signal (value vs. glamour premium) from academic literature. It requires: (1) historical earnings data, (2) market cap calculations, (3) decile ranking across universe of stocks, (4) portfolio formation and annual rebalancing in April, and (5) 5-year holding periods. These capabilities exceed technical indicator-based rule engines. Implementation requires a fundamental data layer and cross-sectional analysis framework.
